title: classification
description: Output contract for intermediate/classification.json (Step 0). Consumed by Steps 1a, 1b, 2, 2.5, 3, 6, 7. See mellea-fy-classify.md for the authoritative axis definitions, signal-weighting rules, and cross-axis halts.

format_version.description: Format version of this classification document (e.g. '1.0'). Bumped when the on-disk shape changes.

archetype.description: Axis 1 — Reasoning archetype. Drives decomposition strategy in Step 1b.

archetype_confidence.description: Optional. Confidence score for archetype detection (0.0-1.0).

shape.description: Axis 2 — Pipeline shape. Drives entry-point construction in Step 3.

shape_phase_count.description: Optional. Number of distinct phases detected. For 'Sequential' shapes should be >= 2 (otherwise cross-axis warning fires).

tool_involvement.description: Axis 3 — Human-readable tool-involvement label paired with tool_involvement_variant.

tool_involvement_variant.description: Axis 3 — Variant code. P0 = no tools; P2 = pipeline calls tools deterministically; P3 = LLM-directed tool calls; P4 = tools provide input.

source_runtime.description: Axis 4 — Detected source runtime (or 'hybrid'/'unknown' per R1).

source_runtime_override.description: Set when --source-runtime=<runtime> was supplied on the command line; overrides signal-based detection. Null when no override provided.

source_runtime_scores.description: Map of runtime → weighted signal score, populated by Axis 4 detection. Used to justify hybrid_threshold_triggered.

hybrid_threshold_triggered.description: True when the top two source_runtime_scores differ by <= 1.0 (R1 hybrid threshold). Implies source_runtime == 'hybrid' unless overridden.

modality.description: Axis 5 — Primary interaction modality. Validated against Axis 1 in cross-axis checks.

modality_confidence.description: Optional. Confidence score for modality detection (0.0-1.0).

secondary_modalities.description: Additional modalities detected when more than one applies (e.g. scheduled + event_triggered). Should not contain the value of 'modality'.

warnings.description: Cross-axis warnings emitted by Step 0 (e.g. 'Axis 5 inferred — no explicit modality signals found').

halt.description: When non-null, Step 0 halted with the given reason (e.g. P0 + D1 incoherent, heartbeat + synchronous_oneshot). Downstream steps MUST refuse to run when halt is set. See mellea-fy-classify.md cross-axis validation table.

archetype.description: Reasoning archetype: A=Analysis, B=Generation, C=Diagnosis, D1=Integration, D2=Orchestration, E=Knowledge.

shape.description: Pipeline shape: Sequential = multi-phase m.instruct calls; One-shot = single m.instruct call.

source_runtime.description: One of the nine supported runtimes, or 'hybrid' (R1 threshold) or 'unknown' (no signals detected).

modality.description: One of eight supported modalities. See mellea-fy-classify.md Axis 5 for declaration signals.
